LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_Warlord.label: Blood Frenzy
LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_Warlord_Source.label: Warlord Aura
LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_VoidWalker.label: Void Veil
LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_VoidWalker.description: Protected by Void Walker's phase field.
LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_VoidWalker_Source.label: Void Walker Aura
LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_Matriarch.label: Life Bloom
LanguageData.TITAN_Aura_Matriarch_Source.label: Matriarch Aura
LanguageData.TITAN_WarlordSoothing.label: Titan Resonance (Soothing)
LanguageData.TITAN_WarlordSoothing.description: Prototype #0's psychic power is trying to calm its rage. When resonance reaches 3 stacks, it will stop attacking.
LanguageData.TITAN_WarlordSoothing.stages.0.label: Resonance I
LanguageData.TITAN_WarlordSoothing.stages.1.label: Resonance II
LanguageData.TITAN_WarlordSoothing.stages.2.label: Resonance Complete
